ab: tucu nu sipulavayan a qadav, vayk amen kati kaka i Babay a sema Valangau a kivala tjay kama i Kuliv.
ch: 這個假日，我和Baby姊姊去台東拜訪Kuliv叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister Baby and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle Kuliv.

ab: na makavavav amen tua ljiuk a kemasi taipaq a pasa valangan.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: ka djemaljun amen i valangan, kicacevungen amen a mapupalidringan tua palidring ni kama i Kuliv.
ch: 到了台東，Kuliv叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: azua pupalidringan inika cadja tua umaq ni kama i Kuliv, nu makavavav itjen tua palidring palamu satje djaljun.
ch: 車站離Kuliv叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle’s house, and it’s just a short drive away.

ab: azua i dudut tua umaq ni kama i Kuliv izua za maljekudral a papaquzipan tua qemuzimuzip, vayk amen a maka tulay a maciur a sema papaquzipan tua qemuzimuzip.
ch: Kuliv叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle’s house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: ka izua amen i papaquzipan tua qemuzimuzip, kacuin amen ni kama i Kuliv a pakan tua sizi katua tjevavav tua rigi.
ch: 在牧場，Kuliv叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: ka qezemezemetj, vayk amen a maciur a sema lemizukan a keman.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: azua i lemizukan liav aravac a palidring, vanasika namaka utubay amen a pasa zuwa.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: ka muri pasa vayk amen, manu cinakav anga utubay, pay pasa amin anga nia makavavav tua basu a vayk izuwa.
ch: 我們要離開的時候，摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: tucu djemaljun anga amen i taipaq, qadjav tuki namadjumak anga a utubay ni kama i Kuliv.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道Kuliv叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don’t know if my uncle’s motorcycle has been found.
